# ha-frontend 20260527.1 — LCARS Theme Impact Analysis

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|

| Type | Pre-release / Beta |
| Published | 2026-05-28T14:48:54Z |
| Analyzed | 2026-06-02T17:26:32Z |

## Release Notes

- Render echarts tooltips with Lit templates (@MindFreeze - #52235)
- Fix row target count flickering, keyboard nav, type device (@wendevlin - #52236)
- Fix ha-radio-option checked theming  (@wendevlin - #52237)
- Don't redispatch the original event in a checklist item (@silamon - #52242)
- Fix automation behavior img file names (@wendevlin - #52247)
- Fix automation note keyboard a11y (@wendevlin - #52270)
- Card visibility-status use ha-alert (@wendevlin - #52271)
- App details improve mobile and icon (@wendevlin - #52275)
- Fix automation add TCA paste (@wendevlin - #52276)
- Fix sun condition Between description showing reversed values (@piitaya - #52279)
- Preserve PNG transparency on area pictures (@piitaya - #52282)
- Don't lowercase translated default action label (@piitaya - #52283)

---

## HIGH IMPACT

No high-impact breaking changes were identified in this release. The diffs contain no CSS custom property renames, no web component element renames, no shadow DOM slot/part restructuring, and no removal of classes or selectors that the ha-lcars theme targets.

---

## MEDIUM IMPACT

### Component: ha-visibility-status (Card Visibility Conditions)

**What changed:** `src/panels/lovelace/editor/conditions/ha-visibility-status.ts` was refactored to replace its previous internal error/warning rendering with the standard `ha-alert` component. The component now extends `LitElement` directly instead of `HaRowItem`, and its internal CSS (removed `styles()` block and associated class-based rules) was stripped out. The component previously rendered inline styled `TemplateResult` markup for alert states; it now delegates entirely to `ha-alert`'s own shadow DOM.

**What it affects in ha-lcars:** The ha-lcars theme does not currently inject any card-mod CSS directly targeting `ha-visibility-status` or its internal structure. However, `ha-alert` is a themed component whose appearance is governed by `--warning-color`, `--error-color` / `error-color`, and `success-color` — all of which ha-lcars *does* define:
```yaml
success-color: var(--lcars-green)
warning-color: var(--lcars-sunflower)
error-color: var(--lcars-dark-red)
```
The net visual effect is that condition-visibility alerts in the Lovelace editor will now render using `ha-alert`'s chip/banner styling (colored border, icon, background) rather than the previous plain inline text. The LCARS color variables will feed into `ha-alert` automatically, so colors should remain consistent, but the *shape and layout* of the alert (padding, border-radius, icon placement) will change from what was previously rendered.

**Suggested fix:** Verify visually in the Lovelace card editor that condition visibility status messages render acceptably under the LCARS theme. If `ha-alert`'s default border-radius or padding conflicts with LCARS aesthetics, add a targeted rule in `card-mod-config-yaml` or the appropriate dialog scope:
```css
"hui-card-visibility-editor $ ha-visibility-status ha-alert$": |
  :host {
    --ha-alert-border-radius: 0px; /* or var(--lcars-inner-radius) */
  }
```

---

### Component: Energy Chart Tooltips (hui-energy-* cards)

**What changed:** All energy chart cards (`hui-energy-devices-detail-graph-card`, `hui-energy-devices-graph-card`, `hui-energy-gas-graph-card`, `hui-energy-solar-graph-card`, `hui-energy-usage-graph-card`, `hui-energy-water-graph-card`, `hui-power-sources-graph-card`) migrated their chart option type from `ECOption` to the new `HaECOption` type. Simultaneously, `energy-chart-options.ts` switched from `filterXSS`-sanitized HTML string formatters to Lit `TemplateResult` formatters via `LitTooltipFormatter`. The new `ha-chart-tooltip-marker` component is now imported and used for tooltip rendering in at least `hui-energy-devices-graph-card`.

**What it affects in ha-lcars:** The ha-lcars theme does not currently inject CSS into energy chart tooltip shadow DOMs. However, the tooltip rendering mechanism has fundamentally changed: tooltips are now rendered as Lit templates inside a new `ha-chart-tooltip-marker` custom element, rather than raw HTML strings injected into eCharts' tooltip container. The visual output of chart tooltips (font, color, background) will now come from `ha-chart-tooltip-marker`'s own styles rather than inline styles embedded in the old HTML string formatter.

If any LCARS users have added custom card-mod rules targeting the eCharts tooltip DOM (e.g., `.echarts-tooltip`, or children of the chart canvas container), those rules may no longer apply.

**Suggested fix:** No fix needed for the base ha-lcars theme as shipped. If tooltip appearance is unsatisfactory (e.g., tooltip background does not respect `--lcars-background-color` or `card-background-color`), a future addition could target `ha-chart-tooltip-marker$` in the relevant card scopes. Monitor after upgrade.

---

## LOW IMPACT

### Component: HaECOption / ha-ec-option.ts (New Type Infrastructure)

**What changed:** A new file `src/resources/echarts/ha-ec-option.ts` was created, exporting `HaECOption`, `HaECSeries`, `HaECSeriesItem`, `HaTooltipOption`, and `LitTooltipFormatter`. These are TypeScript types only. The existing `ECOption` type remains exported from `echarts.ts` unchanged.

**What it affects in ha-lcars:** No CSS or theming impact. No fix needed.

---

### Component: hui-action-editor (Default Action Label Casing)

**What changed:** `src/panels/lovelace/components/hui-action-editor.ts` removed the `.toLowerCase()` call on the default action label string displayed in action editor dropdowns. Action labels will now appear in their translated casing (typically Title Case or Sentence case) rather than being forced to lowercase.

**What it affects in ha-lcars:** The ha-lcars theme applies `text-transform: uppercase` broadly via `card-mod-card` and several config panel rules. The actual string value change is invisible when uppercase transform is active. No fix needed, but worth noting that any config panel context *without* LCARS's uppercase transform will now show the un-lowercased label.

**Suggested fix:** No fix needed.

---

### Component: ha-chart-tooltip-marker (New Component)

**What changed:** `src/components/chart/ha-chart-tooltip-marker.ts` is a newly created component (visible via its import in `hui-energy-devices-graph-card.ts`). It handles rendering of eCharts tooltip marker dots/lines as a standalone custom element.

**What it affects in ha-lcars:** This is a new element the theme could optionally style (e.g., to use LCARS palette colors for chart series markers in tooltips). No current ha-lcars rule targets this element.

**Suggested fix:** No fix needed now. If chart tooltip markers appear visually inconsistent with the LCARS palette in energy cards, a future rule targeting `ha-chart-tooltip-marker$` could be added.

---
